name: Carrot
hint: A root vegetable with an orange color and a crunchy texture.

name: Broccoli
hint: A green vegetable with a tree-like appearance and a mild, earthy taste.

name: Tomato
hint: A red or yellow fruit commonly used as a vegetable in cooking.

name: Spinach
hint: A leafy green vegetable with a slightly bitter taste and high nutritional value.

name: Cucumber
hint: A long, green vegetable with a refreshing taste and a high water content.

name: Bell Pepper
hint: A sweet or spicy fruit with a crunchy texture, available in various colors.

name: Eggplant
hint: A purple or white vegetable with a smooth, shiny skin and a meaty texture.

name: Zucchini
hint: A green summer squash with a mild flavor and a versatile culinary use.

name: Potato
hint: An underground tuber with a starchy texture and a wide range of culinary uses.

name: Onion
hint: A bulb vegetable with a pungent aroma and a savory flavor used in various dishes.
